series_metadata.series_description: This form will document informal corrective counseling or training of employees when the conduct or issue does not rise to the level of an administrative investigation. This shall be used when the counseling or training was not ordered by the Office of Personnel as a result of discipline or a correction imposed as a result of an administrative investigation.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: three (3) years, current year. Paper version should be scanned into Employee Incident Reporting tool and shredded once scanned. ; Electronic: three (3) years, current year
